meta.purpose: Exact file list and paths for new repo setup. Use in conjunction with TRANSFER/12_FIRST_10_DECISIONS_FOR_NEW_REPO.md.

must_port.reason: THE ENTIRE GAME. Non-negotiable. Port this first. Nothing works without it.
verify_after_port: First line: <script> tag loading Phaser CDN

must_port.reason: Complete technical and narrative overview. TIER 1 authority. Must be at repo root, not in docs/.
must_port.note: Already at repo root in old repo — do NOT look for it in docs/

must_port.reason: Entry point for all future agents. First file any new agent reads.
21 non-negotiable laws. TIER 1 authority for soul, tone, humor, character.
7 drift types with kill switches. TIER 1 authority.
Ordered setup sequence for new repo. TIER 1 authority for setup.
Living document of unresolved questions. Must travel with the project.
This file. Needed for future repo-to-repo moves.
High-signal compressed context for cold-start agents.
Current codebase state snapshot. TIER 2 authority.
Chronological record of changes. Necessary for debugging regressions.
High-level feature roadmap and feature flag status. TIER 3 advisory.
CatDemocracyScene spec and World 2 content. TIER 3 advisory.
RastaCorpBossScene spec — the only remaining TIER 1 unfinished feature.
Fight system context and history. Useful when touching combat code.

do_not_port_yet.reason: Contains a deterministic fight engine scaffold. Unclear if integrated into index.html or purely experimental. Do not port until Kevin clarifies.
Unclear relationship to index.html — could be superset, branch, or archive. Porting signals it is authoritative. Do not port until Kevin confirms.
Unknown if newer or older than index.html. Porting the wrong file corrupts the bloodline. Confirm with Kevin before touching.
Standalone F-Zero racing prototype. Unclear if FZeroScene in index.html already supersedes it.
Standalone F-Zero racing prototype. Same uncertainty as cehp_racing_goat.html.
Older handoff document (Mar 1), superseded by HANDOFF_BIBLE.md (Mar 3). Historical reference only. Do not port as authoritative.
do_not_port_yet.note: If ported, put in docs/archive/ and mark clearly as superseded

do_not_port_yet.reason: Debugging artifact from a specific session. Not a living document. No future agent needs it.
Raw AI output. Historical. Superseded by briefing docs.
Raw AI output. Historical. Superseded by briefing docs.
Advisory briefing. Lower signal than Tier 1-2 docs. Port only if Kevin wants full briefing archive.
Advisory briefing. Port if WorldMap anomaly overlay work needs tracing.
Raw AI output format. Briefing already distilled into docs/BRIEFING_DEEPSEEK.md.
Unknown purpose. Do not port until Kevin clarifies.

new_repo_structure.description: The new repo must be flat. No build system. No src/ folder. No package.json.

layout.docs/: Authoritative briefing docs only (see must_port list)

acceptance_test_after_port: Open live GitHub Pages URL in browser
Walk to Level 1-1 → Ed can move, jump, punch, kick
Complete Level 1-1 → WorldMap returns → level node shows beaten
Optionally: Level 1-5 → Big Mochi dies → 300 aloe → WorldMap2 appears
